# PERF-215 positive: bytes.Buffer writes without Grow when len is known
lang: go
file: PERF-215-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "bytes"

func Encode(payload string) string {
	var out bytes.Buffer
	size := len(payload)
	_ = size
	out.WriteString(payload)
	return out.String()
}
